violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as hamburgers) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods in the cold drawer refrigerator unit. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Food items were rearranged for proper storage at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

Various food items were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Food items were properly date marked at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

Working containers of dry ingredients were observed not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Food items were properly labeled at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed in need of repair... - Floor Tiles in the Cafe Kitchen area were observed to be in poor repair (cracked/chipped). - The painted ceiling in the cafe kitchen was observed to be cracked/peeling. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2025
The cold rail located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Per PIC, unit will be serviced next week. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair (cracked and chipped). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024

Raw animal foods (whole shell eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods in the 2 Door Reach-In Refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Eggs were moved for proper storage at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024

Several food items in the Cafe and Cafe Kitchen refrigeration were observed held above 41 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items observed at 45 degrees Fahrenheit or above were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024

At the time of inspection, Reduced Oxygen Packaged Calamari was observed to be thawed in refrigeration in its intact packaging. REDUCED OXYGEN PACKAGED FISH that bears a label indicating that it is to be kept frozen until time of use shall be removed from the reduced oxygen environment prior to its thawing under refrigeration. Packaging was cut open at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024

At the time of inspection, the following equipment was observed in need of repair/adjustment... - The 2 lowboy units were observed at 49-53 degrees at the beginning of the inspection. PIC adjusted units during inspection. PIC instructed to take ambient and food temps of food in the units until reinspection. - The Cold Rail to the large Kitchen Prep Unit was observed to not be maintaining proper food temps entirely across the unit. Per the PIC, refrigeration technician is to be arriving same day. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an Air Gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Air Gap is to be added to drain below sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2024
Floor Tiles in the Cafe Kitchen area were observed to be in poor repair (cracked/chipped). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2024

Candies and Prepared Food Items observed set for sale and self selection by the customers was observed lacking proper label information. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. (Food items were removed from counter and display case to behind the counter at the time of inspection.) New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, residue at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023
